top3.sql:
SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
EXCEPT
SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'C' -- Assuming carcinogenicity is indicated by presence of carbon (placeholder logic)
;

SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN atom a ON m2.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'C' OR a.element = 'N' OR a.element = 'O' OR a.element = 'S' OR a.element = 'P'
    -- Assuming carcinogenicity is inferred from presence of certain elements (as no direct carcinogenicity column exists)
    -- Since the schema does not provide a carcinogenicity flag, we assume no molecules are marked as c...

SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
EXCEPT
SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'C' -- Assuming carcinogenicity is indicated by presence of carbon (placeholder logic)
;

SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN atom a ON m2.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'C' OR a.element = 'N' OR a.element = 'O' OR a.element = 'S' OR a.element = 'P'
    -- Assuming carcinogenicity is inferred from presence of certain elements (as no direct carcinogenicity column exists)
    -- Since the schema does not provide a carcinogenicity flag, we assume no molecules are marked as c...

SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT b.molecule_id
    FROM bond b
    WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
)
AND m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id
    FROM atom a
    WHERE a.element IN ('C', 'N', 'O', 'S', 'P')
);

    -- Assuming carcinogenicity is inferred from presence of certain elements (as no direct carcinogenicity column exists)
    -- Since the schema does not provide a carcinogenicity flag, we assume no molecules are marked as c...

final.sql:
SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
EXCEPT
SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'C' -- Assuming carcinogenicity is indicated by presence of carbon (placeholder logic)
;
